title: Section 7B
content: 1[7B. Chief Rector and Rectors.-- (1) The Chief Commissioner of the 2[Union territory of Delhi] shall be the Chief Rector of the University. (2) Such persons, as may be appointed in this behalf in accordance with the Statutes, shall be Rectors of the University.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by s. 8, ibid. 2. Subs. by the Adaptation of Laws (No. 3) Order, 1956, for "State of Delhi".
